summary: Excellent soundboard capture of a high‑energy Anthem era show with standout Cryptical/Other One and rare Clementine, though the tape may be an edited collection.
review: The recording delivers superb Anthem‑era material, highlighted by a tight, soaring Cryptical/Other One and a rare, Coltrane‑inspired Clementine jam. While the source appears to be a soundboard and sounds clear, the reviewer suspects edits or fades that suggest this may be a compiled set rather than a single concert.

ai_rating.rationale: The lone detailed 5‑star review praises the musical performance and indicates high recording quality, but uncertainty about edits lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Possible edit/fade points noted; reviewer suspects this may be a collection rather than a pure concert capture, but overall sound is clear and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong Anthem‑era flow with tight, high‑energy psychedelia; the sequence around Clementine may have been edited but retains the period’s characteristic groove.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His guitar soars after his first vocal verse on Cryptical/Other One.
